treatment_information.treatment_response: Currently feels comfortable. Persistent non-productive cough, no SOB.

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 15 mg PO BID for 21 days, then 20 mg daily until PCP advises

treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted for treatment after being found to have diffuse, extensive pulmonary emboli on CTA chest.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Suggested to see a hematologist regarding extending anticoagulation therapy
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Clear and coherent, alert and interactive.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient's recent surgery likely predisposed her to forming a blood clot.
